notableEvents.label: Samuel Basallo pinch-hit · Grounded Into DP
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Adley Rutschman out at 2nd. Samuel Basallo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error vs Gunnar Henderson · Bot 1
notableEvents.detail: Orioles challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Gunnar Henderson reaches on a fielder's choice. Taylor Ward to 3rd. Gunnar Henderson to 2nd. Taylor Ward advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by third baseman Kazuma Okamoto.
